recommendation.title: Resume Recommendation: DarisChenResumeAI.pdf
recommendation.summary: Strong match for AI Engineer role. Your AI-focused resume best positions your generative AI, ML engineering, and data infrastructure experience against Mortenson's core requirements.
top_signals: Generative AI leadership: Claude Sonnet integration, OpenAI embeddings, prompt caching optimization
ML engineering: Custom R-CNN pipeline (Detectron2), semantic search architecture with pgvector
Enterprise ML infrastructure: Built-to-production systems on Supabase, EC2, PostgreSQL at scale
Data architecture expertise: Hybrid search engines, semantic ranking, high-dimensional similarity systems
AI agent frameworks: Career-Ops conductor-worker-judge pipeline with parallel subagent orchestration
recommendation.explanation: The AI resume captures your deepest expertise in generative AI models, LLM integration (Claude, OpenAI), and production ML systems—exactly what Mortenson seeks. Your FishSense R-CNN pipeline and PatentIQ semantic search demonstrate 'testing and evaluating AI solutions' and 'translating business requirements into business-ready AI solutions.' The Career-Ops project shows agent framework experience. Score gap of 19 points over SWE resume is decisive. Only gap: construction domain experience (Procore/Autodesk) and PowerBI—neither are blockers, and your full-stack architecture skills translate directly.
recommendation.gap_analysis: Construction platform exposure and PowerBI are not highlighted. Address in cover letter by showing ability to learn domain-specific tools (Procore/Autodesk APIs) and noting that your data visualization/dashboard work across multiple projects demonstrates similar BI capability.
recommendation.recommendation_action: APPLY with AI resume. No form detected, so proceed directly to review application materials before submission.

notes: No application form detected on job posting. Recommendation is resume-only. Verify application channel before submitting.
